'''鈭歳-j-zh-f''' ('''karajzhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrofish|electrofish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrofish|electrofish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-j-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| karajzhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirajzhefoko|thirajzhefoko]] || [[word:jirajzhefoko|jirajzhefoko]] || [[word:shirajzhefoko|shirajzhefoko]] || [[word:kirajzhefoko|kirajzhefoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
